name: sally
description: SALLY - Rest Optimization System for truck drivers

scripts.doppler:backend: cd apps/backend && doppler run -- pnpm run dev
scripts.doppler:frontend: cd apps/web && doppler run -- pnpm run dev
scripts.doppler:console: cd apps/console && doppler run -- pnpm run dev
scripts.doppler:backend:stg-debug: cd apps/backend && doppler run --config dev_stg_debug -- pnpm run dev
scripts.test:qa:local: doppler run --project sally-backend --config dev -- pnpm --filter @sally/qa test
scripts.test:smoke:local: doppler run --project sally-backend --config dev -- pnpm --filter @sally/qa test:smoke
scripts.test:rbac:local: doppler run --project sally-backend --config dev -- pnpm --filter @sally/qa test:rbac
scripts.test:api:local: doppler run --project sally-backend --config dev -- pnpm --filter @sally/qa test:api
scripts.test:browser:local: doppler run --project sally-backend --config dev -- pnpm --filter @sally/qa test:browser
scripts.qa:list-tenants: doppler run --project sally-backend --config dev -- pnpm --filter @sally/qa list-tenants
scripts.qa:enable-features: doppler run --project sally-backend --config dev -- pnpm --filter @sally/qa qa:enable-features
scripts.tenant:reset: doppler run --project sally-backend --config dev -- pnpm --filter @sally/backend tenant:reset
scripts.screenshots:refresh: pnpm --filter @sally/screenshots capture && pnpm --filter @sally/screenshots generate-manifest && pnpm --filter @sally/screenshots distribute
